title: Odes Of Anacreon - Ode LXXII.
content:
Fare thee well, perfidious maid,
    My soul, too long on earth delayed,
    Delayed, perfidious girl, by thee,
    Is on the wing for liberty.
    I fly to seek a kindlier sphere,
    Since thou hast ceased to love me here!
meaning:
"Odes Of Anacreon - Ode LXXII." is a quintessential example of Thomas Moore's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
